parameters.value: {'id': 'TC-API-USERS-004', 'title': 'PUT /users/1 — full update of an existing user', 'severity': 'NORMAL', 'tags': ['regression', 'crud'], 'story': 'User CRUD', 'level': 'API', 'endpoint': '/users/1', 'method': 'PUT', 'expected_status': 200, 'assert_type': 'update', 'payload': {'id': 1, 'name': 'Updated Name', 'username': 'updated_user', 'email': 'updated@example.com', 'address': {'street': 'New Street', 'suite': 'Apt. 1', 'city': 'Beijing', 'zipcode': '100000', 'geo': {'lat': '39.9042', 'lng': '116.4074'}}, 'phone': '+86-10-0000-0000', 'website': 'updated.example.com', 'company': {'name': 'Updated Corp.', 'catchPhrase': 'Better every day', 'bs': 'continuous delivery'}}}
